retry_reason: Not a wrapper; the function allocates and registers an input device. Failure typically indicates resource exhaustion or configuration error, which is unlikely to resolve on retry without changes.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is initialization and registration of an input device, not refcount management. The only refcount operation (input_free_device) is used solely for error cleanup.
